memory._comment: Auto-memory disabled per s88 architecture decision. Workflow is mobile-first; auto-memory is laptop-filesystem-only and would not sync across surfaces. Family-related dynamic learnings live in Firestore players/{name}.coach_notes вЂ” see references/coach-notes-schema.md.

tools._comment: Default tool permissions. Firebase MCP plugin tools are auto-enabled when plugin loads. Bash/file editing tools always available.
